hypothesis: Incorporating a confidence estimation signal into E2EFOLD's Gumbel-Softmax sampling temperature—specifically by dynamically conditioning τ on the per-residue entropy of the encoder's predicted sequence distribution during inference—will further improve self-consistency for structurally ambiguous regions (high-entropy residues) by reducing stochastic sampling variance precisely where sequence-structure degeneracy is greatest, while preserving sequence diversity in well-defined structural contexts.
